mapper.sql: COMPANY, COMPANYCODE, Benbu, dept_erjibu, dept_erjibuCode, FNUMBER, Daqu, FDEPTNAME, FLONGNUMBER, FFULLNAME, PARENTFNUMBER, PARENTFNAME, DEPTCODE, UNITLEVEL, UNITLEVELNAME, PSNSMCID, PSNNAME, FUZERENPOSITION, POSITIONNAME, ISSALEHOLON, SALEDEPTFNUMBER, SALEDEPTFNAME
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.hr_holon
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.hr_holon (COMPANY, COMPANYCODE, Benbu, dept_erjibu, dept_erjibuCode, FNUMBER, Daqu, FDEPTNAME, FLONGNUMBER, FFULLNAME, PARENTFNUMBER, PARENTFNAME, DEPTCODE, UNITLEVEL, UNITLEVELNAME, PSNSMCID, PSNNAME, FUZERENPOSITION, POSITIONNAME, ISSALEHOLON, SALEDEPTFNUMBER, SALEDEPTFNAME) values (#{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companycode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{benbu,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptErjibu,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptErjibucode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fnumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{daqu,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fdeptname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{flongnumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ffullname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentfnumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentfname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitlevel,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{unitlevelname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{psnsmcid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{psnname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fuzerenposition,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{positionname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{issaleholon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saledeptfnumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saledeptfname,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into dbo.hr_holon
COMPANY,
COMPANYCODE,
Benbu,
dept_erjibu,
dept_erjibuCode,
FNUMBER,
Daqu,
FDEPTNAME,
FLONGNUMBER,
FFULLNAME,

DEPTCODE,

UNITLEVELNAME,
PSNSMCID,
PSNNAME,
FUZERENPOSITION,
POSITIONNAME,
ISSALEHOLON,
SALEDEPTFNUMBER,
SALEDEPTFNAME,

#{benbu,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

mapper.update:
update dbo.hr_holon
COMPANY = #{record.company,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
COMPANYCODE = #{record.companycode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Benbu = #{record.benbu,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_erjibu = #{record.deptErjibu,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_erjibuCode = #{record.deptErjibucode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FNUMBER = #{record.fnumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Daqu = #{record.daqu,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FDEPTNAME = #{record.fdeptname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FLONGNUMBER = #{record.flongnumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FFULLNAME = #{record.ffullname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PARENTFNUMBER = #{record.parentfnumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PARENTFNAME = #{record.parentfname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEPTCODE = #{record.deptcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UNITLEVEL = #{record.unitlevel,jdbcType=BIGINT},
UNITLEVELNAME = #{record.unitlevelname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PSNSMCID = #{record.psnsmcid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PSNNAME = #{record.psnname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FUZERENPOSITION = #{record.fuzerenposition,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
POSITIONNAME = #{record.positionname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ISSALEHOLON = #{record.issaleholon,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SALEDEPTFNUMBER = #{record.saledeptfnumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SALEDEPTFNAME = #{record.saledeptfname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.hr_holon set COMPANY = #{record.company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COMPANYCODE = #{record.companycode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Benbu = #{record.benbu,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_erjibu = #{record.deptErjibu,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_erjibuCode = #{record.deptErjibucode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FNUMBER = #{record.fnumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Daqu = #{record.daqu,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FDEPTNAME = #{record.fdeptname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FLONGNUMBER = #{record.flongnumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FFULLNAME = #{record.ffullname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PARENTFNUMBER = #{record.parentfnumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PARENTFNAME = #{record.parentfname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEPTCODE = #{record.deptcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UNITLEVEL = #{record.unitlevel,jdbcType=BIGINT}, UNITLEVELNAME = #{record.unitlevelname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PSNSMCID = #{record.psnsmcid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PSNNAME = #{record.psnname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FUZERENPOSITION = #{record.fuzerenposition,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, POSITIONNAME = #{record.positionname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISSALEHOLON = #{record.issaleholon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SALEDEPTFNUMBER = #{record.saledeptfnumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SALEDEPTFNAME = #{record.saledeptfname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
